zh.lifeSummary: Donna Dorotea Orsini於1176年出生在義大利福利福利 維其亞 朱莉婭武丁布亞武爾希尼斯。她和Don Landolfo Caracciolo至少有1個女兒。她去世在義大利坎帕尼亞拿坡里拿坡里。

nameMeanings.name: Orsini
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Angelo, Armando, Donato, Orlando, Antonio, Mario, Carmine, Nunzio, Pasquale, Vittorio, Camillo, Dante, Domenic.  Spanish Carlos, Domingo, Jose, Santos, Alejandro, Ana, Anacleto.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of   Orsino  .

variants.name: Orsino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Orlando, Annunziata, Salvatore.
Italian: from a diminutive of the vocabulary word or a pet form of the personal name   Orso  .

nameMeanings.name: Dorotea
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a post-classical Greek name, from dōron ‘gift’ + theos ‘god’ (the same elements as in Theodora , but in reverse order). The masculine form Dorotheus was borne by several early Christian saints, the feminine by only two minor ones, but only the girl's name has survived. In modern use in the English-speaking world it represents either a 19th-century Latinization of Dorothy or a learned reborrowing.

en.lifeSummary: Donna Dorotea Orsini was born in 1176, in Ursinis, Buia, Udine, Friuli Venezia Giulia, Italy. She had at least 1 daughter with Don Landolfo Caracciolo. She died in Naples, Naples, Campania, Italy.

ko.Ursinis, Buia, Udine, Friuli Venezia Giu: 이탈리아 프리우리 븐지아 주리야 우딘 버이아 르시니스
ko.lifeSummary: Donna Dorotea Orsini(은)는 1176년 이탈리아 프리우리 븐지아 주리야 우딘 버이아 르시니스에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Don Landolfo Caracciolo(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 이탈리아 캠파니아 나폴리 나폴리에서 사망했다.
